chunks.page_summary: This page provides instructions on how to perform a software-based power reset of a Rheonics sensor using the Rheonics Control Panel (RCP) software.
chunks.extracted_text:
Phone: +1 713 234 0863

How do you reset your Rheonics sensor?

Modified on: Mon, 24 Mar, 2025 at 7:16 PM

There are two methods to power reset the Rheonics sensor: the first is through the RCP software, and the second is by using the reset button on the front of the SME.

1. Reset using the RCP software

A power reset can be done from the software side. Simply go to the “Settings” tab and enable Expert Mode using the password provided in the user manual.

Figure 1. Enabling expert mode to access the Power reset button

Press the 'Power Reset' button. The sensor will stop communicating, and if using USB communication, you will hear a beep similar to when connecting a new device to a PC. The sensor LED will turn off for approximately one second. It can take a few seconds until the sensor goes back into operation.
key_facts: There are two methods to power reset a Rheonics sensor: using the RCP software or pressing a physical reset button on the front of the SME.
A software-based power reset is initiated through the "Settings" tab in the Rheonics Control Panel software by enabling Expert Mode.
Enabling Expert Mode requires a password, which is provided in the user manual.
Pressing the 'Power Reset' button will cause the sensor to stop communicating.
If using USB communication, a beep will be heard during the sensor reset, similar to connecting a new device.
The sensor's LED will turn off for approximately one second during the reset process.
The sensor may take a few seconds to return to full operation after a power reset.
diagram_labels: Plot df (damping) and Fres (resonant frequency) instead of Viscosity & Density
Log and display data with error code
Expert mode (label on arrow pointing to 'Expert Mode' button)
warnings_notes: Enabling Expert Mode requires the password provided in the user manual.

chunks.page_summary: This page provides instructions on how to use the 'Power Reset' button within the Rheonics Control Panel software and how to physically reset a Rheonics sensor.

Figure 2. The power reset button is available in the RCP software by going to the “Settings” tab
2. Using the Reset button
The reset can be performed using a fine-point pen or an unfolded paper clip. The reset button can be between the SD-card port and the Ethernet port.
(https://youtube.com/shorts/OXf7z4vDac?feature=share)
How do you reset your Rheonics sensor?
rheonics
Watch on
key_facts: The 'Power Reset' button in the Rheonics Control Panel (RCP) software is located under the 'Settings' tab.
A physical reset of a Rheonics sensor can be performed using a fine-point pen or an unfolded paper clip.
The physical reset button on the Rheonics sensor is located between the SD-card port and the Ethernet port.
The Rheonics Control Panel software displays operator and client information, sensor configuration, communication settings, units, resolution, pressure gauge data, graph settings, and log settings.
The software allows configuring units for viscosity (mPa.s, cP, cSt), density (g/cc, kg/m³, lb/gal, lb/ft³), temperature (°C, °K, °F), and pressure (bar, kPa, MPa, psi, torr, atm).
Graph settings for kinematic viscosity, density, temperature, and pressure scales can be configured with minimum and maximum values.
The software provides options for logging interval, measurement frequency, and logging of data with error codes and debug information.
